ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: OR( AND( ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "L2 Closed"), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), "Escalated to L2")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Case_Sub_Type__c, 'Service Complaints')) ), ISNEW() && ISPICKVAL(Status, "L2 Closed") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change the status to L2 Closed if the case is not Escalated.
